title: TotalEnergies Bets On Ksi Lisims LNG, Acquires Developer Stake And Supply
author: Lekha Gupta
description: TotalEnergies has signed a 20-year agreement to purchase 2 Mtpa of LNG from the Ksi Lisims LNG project in Canada and is acquiring a 5% stake in the project's developer, Western LNG, with an option to increase its stake to around 10%.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article mentions that investors can gain exposure to TotalEnergies through the FT Energy Income Partners Strategy ETF (EIPX), but does not provide any specific commentary on the ETF's performance or investment strategy.

The article also mentions the First Trust Exchange-Traded Fund VIII FT Energy Income Partners Enhanced Income ETF (EIPI) as a way for investors to gain exposure to TotalEnergies, but does not provide any additional details about the ETF.
